title: Gravel Tweaks
description: Adds the ability to allow you to pack and unpack gravel and also improves crafting
body:
# Gravel Tweaks - Unleash the Potential of Gravel!

Dive into a world of crafting innovation with the Gravel Tweaks datapack for Minecraft! Tired of gravel being just another block in your adventures? This datapack breathes new life into gravel by introducing exciting crafting recipes that will revolutionize your gameplay.

## Crafting Recipes:
![Gravel pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbff1bc776f59b2b4a0adb5a5d3a07896a0def8c.png)
![Gravel unpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a50c0a0da3bef4875a5db87ed5b0c4f6885c9add.png)
![Flint and steel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20893175e8a8ee4bd02cad4b195b4e1cfe8e1f2d.png)
![Arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8d93c47a9f536d5af01ff0aa41b61204609536.png)
![Fletching table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c5e94c7aa284f89a10b94dc0fc2f4aeca9fc2a9.png)


## How to Install:
1. Download the Gravel Tweaks datapack.
2. Place the downloaded file in the "datapacks" folder of your Minecraft world.

## Unleash Your Creativity:
Gravel Tweaks opens up a world of possibilities, turning gravel into a valuable resource for your crafting endeavors. Explore the enhanced crafting experience, experiment with new recipes, and watch as your gameplay reaches new heights.

Revitalize your Minecraft experience with Gravel Tweaks – where gravel becomes the cornerstone of your crafting journey!
